task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map view to Bora Bora.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map application shows the island of Bora Bora centered in the view, with coordinates near 16.5°S, 151.7°W visible in the status bar or interface.

task_completion.description: Agent draws a polygon tracing the coastline of the main island.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A polygon outline is visible surrounding the central island. Crucially, the polygon must exclude the outer barrier reef and the 'motu' (small islets on the reef ring).

task_completion.description: Agent names the polygon 'Bora Bora Main Island'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the application's sidebar (e.g., 'Places' or 'Layers' panel) or properties dialog, the polygon entry is labeled 'Bora Bora Main Island'.

task_completion.description: Agent views the Area and Perimeter measurements of the polygon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Properties', 'Measurements', or 'Geometry' window is open, displaying values for Area (approx 29 sq km) and Perimeter (approx 32 km).

task_completion.description: Agent saves the results to the specified text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, terminal command, or text editor shows the file '/home/ga/bora_bora_shape_analysis.txt' being created or edited.

task_completion.description: The output file contains the correct calculated values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of 'bora_bora_shape_analysis.txt' is visible. It lists Area between 25-38 sq km, Perimeter between 25-45 km, and a Polsby-Popper score between 0.25-0.45.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the mapping software's GUI to trace the shape.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the polygon being drawn or edited with mouse interactions (e.g., control points visible), rather than the polygon appearing instantly via script.

integrity.description: Verify that the saved values match the measurements observed in the tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Area and Perimeter values written in the text file should correspond to the values shown in the mapping tool's measurement window (allowing for minor rounding), not arbitrary values within the accepted range.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not search for the area/perimeter online.
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browser screenshots showing search queries like 'Bora Bora land area' or 'Bora Bora perimeter'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Bora Bora Main Island (approx -16.50, -151.74). The polygon must trace the central island, excluding the outer reef ring. Verified metrics: Area approx 29.3 sq km (accept 25-38), Perimeter approx 32 km (accept 25-45). Polsby-Popper Score approx 0.36 (accept 0.25-0.45).
